prompt: The odds of winning the US Powerball jackpot on a single ticket are 1 in N. What is N? (Powerball: pick 5 white balls from 69, plus 1 red Powerball from 26.)
source: Official Powerball odds (powerball.com). 5 white balls from 69 is C(69, 5) = 11,238,513 combinations; 1 of 26 Powerballs makes 11,238,513 × 26 = 292,201,338.
revealExplanation: C(69, 5) = 11,238,513 ways to pick the white balls, multiplied by 26 ways to pick the red Powerball, gives 292,201,338 distinct tickets. Most people know the odds are bad; few people sense just how bad. You'd need to buy a ticket every second for over 9 years to expect one jackpot.
